<?php /** * This file is part of the ZBateson\MailMimeParser project. * * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/bsd-license.php BSD */ namespace ZBateson\MailMimeParser\Message\Factory; use ZBateson\MailMimeParser\Message\PartChildrenContainer; /** * Creates PartChildrenContainer instances. * * @author Zaahid Bateson */ class PartChildrenContainerFactory { public function newInstance() : PartChildrenContainer { return new PartChildrenContainer(); } }
